name: Pecan Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour and brown sugar.
2. Cut in the butter using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Press the mixture evenly into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 17 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the brown sugar and remaining ingredients except pecans. Beat well.
6. Stir in the chopped pecans.
7. Pour the filling over the prepared crust.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until firm.
9. Let cool, then cut into bars.
Yield: about 2-1/2 dozen.
